foia.title: FOIA Request Portal
foia.subtitle: Freedom of Information Act Request System

fees.no_fees_anticipated: No fees anticipated for this request
fees.fee_waiver_eligible: You may be eligible for a fee waiver

appeal.title: Appeal Coach
appeal.frivolous_warning: This appeal may be considered frivolous
appeal.legal_disclaimer: This is informational guidance, not legal advice. For complex cases, consider consulting an attorney.

translation.title: Translation
translation.translation_note: Your request has been automatically translated. A professional review may be conducted if needed.
translation.languages_supported: We support requests in 10 languages including Spanish, Chinese, Vietnamese, French, Arabic, Filipino, Korean, Russian, and Portuguese.

messages.request_submitted: Your FOIA request has been submitted successfully.
messages.confirmation_sent: A confirmation email has been sent to your email address.
messages.request_not_found: Request not found. Please check your confirmation number.
messages.session_limit_reached: You have reached the maximum number of sessions for this request.
messages.translation_failed: Translation failed. Please try again or submit your request in English.
messages.please_wait: Please wait while we process your request...

help.foia_explanation: The Freedom of Information Act (FOIA) gives you the right to request access to federal agency records.

validation.invalid_email: Please enter a valid email address
validation.invalid_phone: Please enter a valid phone number
